original_text: Competitive dynamics intensified following Google's announcement of enhanced image editing capabilities in its Gemini app, which sent Adobe stock lower by 1.7% on the news [C112]. The Gemini upgrade potentially threatens Adobe's dominance in the digital imaging market, contributing to investor concerns about competitive positioning [C112]. This competitive pressure comes as the broader motion graphics market is expected to reach approximately USD 280 Billion by 2034, growing at a 12.2% CAGR between 2025 and 2034 [C102].
revised_text: Competitive dynamics intensified following Google's announcement of enhanced image editing capabilities in its Gemini app, which sent Adobe stock lower by 1.7% on the news [C112]. The Gemini upgrade potentially threatens Adobe's dominance in the digital imaging market, contributing to investor concerns about competitive positioning [C112]. This competitive pressure comes as the broader motion graphics market is expected to reach approximately USD 280 Billion by 2034, growing at a 12.2% CAGR through 2034 [C102].
changes_summary: Revised the CAGR forecast period from 'between 2025 and 2034' to 'through 2034' to align with chunk C102, which specifies a 2024 base valuation and does not support a 2025 start year.
